ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory the product belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the product */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the product */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the product is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the product */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who updated the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the product image */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the image is the default image for the product or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, customer, seller) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the review is approved or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city of the order */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state of the order */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Shipping country of the order */,
  "shipping_zip" TEXT /* Shipping zip code of the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the order */,
  "billing_city" TEXT /* Billing city of the order */,
  "billing_state" TEXT /* Billing state of the order */,
  "billing_country" TEXT /* Billing country of the order */,
  "billing_zip" TEXT /* Billing zip code of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the wishlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the product to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the cart */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the product to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number or token */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the payment method */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name on the card or account */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the payment method is the default or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
